settings.name: name_pattern
settings.description: Image filename pattern (empty string = image name)

settings.display_name: How to handle conflicting files (non-interactive run mode only)

gui_type_kwargs.placeholder_label: No recognized image formats in added files

settings.name: file_format_mode
settings.display_name: How to adjust file format options:
settings.description: Native dialogs usually allow you to adjust more options such as image metadata, while adjusting options in place is more convenient as no extra dialog is displayed before the export.

png.name: save-transparent
png.display_name: Save color values from transparent pixels
png.description: Preserve color of completely transparent pixels

png.name: optimize-palette
png.display_name: Optimize for smallest possible palette size
png.description: When checked, save as 1, 2, 4, or 8-bit depending on number of colors used. When unchecked, always save as 8-bit

png.description: Save Exif (Exchangeable image file format) metadata

png.name: include-color-profile
png.description: Save the ICC color profile as metadata

png.name: include-thumbnail
png.description: Save a smaller representation of the image as metadata

webp.name: alpha-quality
webp.description: Quality of the image's alpha channel

webp.name: default-delay
webp.description: Default delay (in milliseconds) to use when timestamps for frames are not available or forced.

webp.display_name: Use default delay for all frames
